The current visit record primarily details diagnoses and management related to severe cardiovascular conditions (Paroxysmal ventricular tachycardia, Chronic systolic heart failure, Atrioventricular block, Atrial fibrillation, Atherosclerosis, Diabetes mellitus, Hypertensive chronic kidney disease). While the patient is prescribed Atorvastatin, which is a medication used to manage dyslipidemia, the provided record does not contain any explicit diagnostic evidence (such as documented hypercholesterolemia or hyperlipidemia) to support the explicit coding of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" in the next visit. The presence of Atorvastatin alone, in the absence of a documented lipid diagnosis, is insufficient evidence according to the strict guidelines provided.
